name: Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach the rotor slicer/shredder using a fine shredding cone.
2. Turn to speed 4 and shred the zucchini. Measure out 2 cups and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar, softened butter, and eggs. Attach a flat beater and beat on speed 4 for 45 seconds. Stop and scrape the bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Beat on speed 2 for 15 seconds.
6. Add the shredded zucchini and grated lemon peel. Mix on speed 2 for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from pans and cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 2 loaves
